commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P2] Human maintainer review should decide whether to accept the compatibility, session-state, and availability tradeoffs; I did not find a narrow automated repair to request.; Cleared: The diff does not add dependencies, workflow execution, secret handling, package-resolution changes, or broader permissions; the security-sensitive session cleanup changes are covered as functional merge risk. (sha=2aa61b24ea0312ff71d1d78fce28015638e0bd9c)
commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the Codex app-server completion watchdog, native stream delta activity accounting, timeout recovery, thread-binding cleanup, metadata/docs, and focused regression coverage for false completion stalls.

PR surface: Source +132, Tests +313, Docs +10. Total +455 across 19 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source-and-report level: the linked issue and PR body include live turn_completion_idle_timeout traces after raw assistant progress, and the new tests model the native response delta and retry-exhausted paths. I did not run a live Telegram reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human maintainer review should decide whether to accept the compatibility, session-state, and availability tradeoffs; I did not find a narrow automated repair to request.

target.title: fix(codex): prevent false completion stalls during native streams
target.body:
## Summary
- Keep raw assistant progress on the documented `turn/completed` terminal guard; progress text is still not treated as a final answer.
- Count forwarded native Codex response stream deltas, including `response.custom_tool_call_input.delta`, as active turn activity and attempt progress while a turn is already open.
- Guard unscoped native `response.*.delta` notifications so they only refresh a turn when the shared app-server client has one active lease; concurrent leased turns no longer keep each other's watchdogs alive.
- Keep the post-tool raw-assistant fallback timeout conservative at `5 * 60_000` / `300000` ms for app-server/native paths that do not forward stream deltas, and align runtime docs plus plugin metadata.
- Preserve recovery behavior for actual completion stalls: replay only replay-safe attempts; for side-effecting/non-replay-safe stalls retire the stuck app-server client, clear stale native thread binding only when it still points at the timed-out thread, release the lane, and surface a recoverable incomplete-turn result.
- After the one replay-safe stdio retry is exhausted, a repeated `turn_completion_idle_timeout` now falls through to the normal timeout payload path instead of rejecting the embedded run.

## Why this shape
The failure is not that raw assistant progress needs to become deliverable final text. The failure is that native Codex can spend a long time actively streaming a large tool input/patch after a raw assistant progress item has completed, before any completed tool-call notification exists. Without counting those `response.*.delta` events as activity, OpenClaw can falsely fire `turn.completion_idle_timeout` while the model is still working.

This keeps the lifecycle semantics strict: final delivery still requires `turn/completed`; active native stream deltas only keep the watchdog from killing a live turn. The latest review fixes also avoid cross-talk for unscoped deltas and keep retry-exhausted completion-idle failures on the timeout-result path.

## Real behavior proof
- Behavior addressed: Codex-backed Telegram turns could be falsely aborted while native Codex was still streaming response deltas for a large tool input/patch after raw assistant progress, producing `Codex stopped before confirming the turn was complete. Some work may already have been performed; verify the current state before retrying.`
- Real environment tested: Keshav's live OpenClaw gateway and Telegram group flow on 2026-05-29 IST.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: Keshav built and restarted the gateway from this PR branch after the native-delta runtime fix, then reattempted the Vietnam webpage edit flow that had repeatedly failed with the completion-idle watchdog. The latest pushed head `2aa61b24ea` is rebased onto `origin/main` `040eba1cdc`; the final commit on top is test-only stabilization after the runtime proof.
- Evidence after fix: Copied live output from the Telegram operator thread:

```text
2026-05-29 21:46 IST, Keshav G:
I built and restarted server
Then reattempted the vietnam webpage and yay it worked this time without errors

2026-05-29 23:41 IST, Keshav G:
I have build and restarted
Now do the tests, ci and submit latest proof from latest Heads
```

- Observed result after fix: The previously repeated Vietnam webpage edit flow completed without the prior `turn.completion_idle_timeout` / `Codex stopped before confirming the turn was complete` error after the gateway was built and restarted from the PR branch.
- What was not tested: The bot did not personally restart the live gateway; Keshav performed the build/restart. Latest GitHub Actions were still running when this proof was added, and local validation is listed below.

## Review feedback addressed
Latest head: `2aa61b24ea` on `origin/main` base `040eba1cdc`.

- Plugin config metadata and both Codex harness docs now agree with the runtime default: `postToolRawAssistantCompletionIdleTimeoutMs` defaults to `300000` ms.
- Timeout cleanup now clears the persisted Codex app-server binding only if the stored binding still points at the timed-out thread, preserving transient-turn bindings.
- Unscoped native response deltas now count as activity only when the shared app-server client reports a single active lease; scoped deltas for the active turn still count directly.
- Retry-exhausted replay-safe stdio `turn_completion_idle_timeout` failures now surface the timeout payload instead of throwing the prompt error after the one retry has already been used.
- Added focused regression coverage for binding-preserving cleanup, concurrent-lease unscoped deltas, native response delta activity, and retry-exhausted completion-idle timeout handling.

## Tests / validation
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD` passed on head `2aa61b24ea`.
- Targeted `oxfmt --check` passed on changed TypeScript/plugin files on head `2aa61b24ea`.
- Focused Vitest passed on head `2aa61b24ea`: `6` files / `82` tests.

Focused Vitest command:

```bash
./node_modules/.bin/vitest run \
  extensions/codex/src/app-server/attempt-results.test.ts \
  extensions/codex/src/app-server/attempt-timeouts.test.ts \
  extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.turn-watches.test.ts \
  extensions/codex/src/app-server/session-binding.test.ts \
  src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.codex-app-server-recovery.test.ts \
  --reporter=dot
```

## Related issue
- Related to #87744. This PR addresses the Codex-backed Telegram completion-idle family; the live proof narrows one concrete false-timeout cause to native response delta streams not being counted as turn activity.
target.author: keshavbotagent
